SchemaV2Field.description: Contains details about a schema field for an Iceberg table that supports nested types (struct, list, map)

Type.description: The field type. For primitive types, use a string (e.g., 'int', 'string', 'long'). For nested types, use an object (e.g., {'type': 'struct', 'fields': [...]} for struct, {'type': 'list', 'element-id': N, 'element': 'type'} for list, {'type': 'map', 'key-id': N, 'key': 'type', 'value-id': N, 'value': 'type'} for map).
